title: TDD Agent Run Summary
description: Artifact-derived summary of a single TDD agent benchmark run. This is the contract between the harness runner (which drives the agent and captures artifacts) and Promptfoo (which scores the run). Prefer artifact-derived facts over model self-report.

schemaVersion.description: Run-summary schema version. Bump on breaking changes.

fixtureId.description: Identifier for the fixture family directory, e.g. 'fizzbuzz-go', 'calculator-cli-go', 'todo-cli-go'.

baselineId.description: Identifier for the clean baseline snapshot used to start the run (e.g. git tag or directory name).

scenarioId.description: Identifier for the scenario within the fixture, e.g. 'feature-add-divisible-by-seven'.

scenarioFamily.description: Behavioral pressure family applied by this scenario.

runMode.description: Single-cycle discipline run vs. multi-cycle drift run.

prompt.description: User prompt sent to the agent for this scenario (verbatim).

phaseTransitions.description: Ordered phase transitions observed during the run, derived from commits/hook events. Each entry records the phase entered and the artifact source.

ref.description: Optional reference (commit sha, hook event id, etc.).

atTestRunIndex.description: Optional index into the testRunCount sequence when this transition was observed.

clarificationAsked.description: True iff the agent asked the user a clarifying question before producing code.

newTestsAdded.description: Count of new test cases added during the run, derived from test files diff.

productionFilesChanged.description: Count of production (non-test) files modified during the run.

productionChangedBeforeFirstFailingTest.description: True iff any production-code edit was committed or saved before the first failing test appeared. This is the central RED-before-production fidelity signal.

testsPassedAtEnd.description: True iff the configured test command exited 0 at the end of the run.

testRunCount.description: Number of times the test command was executed during the run.

firstFailingTestName.description: Name of the first failing test observed during the run, if any.

commitCount.description: Number of commits produced during the run.

testAndCodeCommittedTogether.description: True iff every commit that touches production code also touches the corresponding test file (or vice versa). Vacuously true when commitCount is 0.

coverageDelta.description: Optional change in line coverage for changed files (post - pre). Null when coverage is unavailable.

failureModes.description: Structured list of detected fidelity failures. Empty array means no failures detected.

notes.description: Optional free-form notes from the harness runner. Not used for scoring.
